title: Tandulwadi Fort
tagline: Tandulwadi Fort — heritage city of Maharashtra

overview.short: Tandulwadi Fort is located near Saphale, 104 km north of Mumbai.
overview.description: Tandulwadi Fort is located near Saphale, 104 km north of Mumbai. Tandulwadi is not a fully built up fort, but a series of structures spread over the top of the mountain. The fort dates back 800 years and was primarily used as a watch tower over the surrounding plains. At a height of 1524 feet, it has views of the surrounding towns of Saphale, the Zanzorli lake, and the confluence of the Surya and Vaitarna rivers.

topPlaces.name: Surya River (India)
topPlaces.description: The Surya River is a river in located in the Palghar district of Maharashtra. It is located 95.8 kilometres (59.5 mi) north of Mumbai the capital of the state.

topPlaces.name: Saphale
topPlaces.description: Saphale (also spelled Safāle or Saphala) is a town in Palghar Taluka in Palghar District in Maharashtra, India, north of the mouth of the Vaitarna River. According to Census 2011 information, the location code or village code of Saphale village is 552293.

topPlaces.name: Bahadoli
topPlaces.description: Bahadoli is a village in the Palghar taluka of Palghar district located in Maharashtra State, India.

topPlaces.name: Makunsar
topPlaces.description: Makunsar is a village in Maharashtra, India, located 6 kilometres (3.7 mi) away from Saphale's railway station (Western railway), on the Saphale-Palghar road. Gaon is well known for Temples, because more numbers of temples are seen in this gaon.

topPlaces.name: Aagarwadi
topPlaces.description: Agarwadi (Aagarwadi) is a small village in Maharashtra, India, having a population around 3600. The village is located at a distance of 6 km (3.7 mi) from Saphale Railway station, west side.

topPlaces.name: Kaldurg Fort
topPlaces.description: Kaldurg Fort is east of Palghar, Maharashtra, India, in the Sahyadri mountain range of northern Konkan. Its height is at least 475 meters above sea level, giving views of the Arabian Sea and the industrial town of Palghar to the west, as well as views of the Surya River, to the east.

items.note: The Surya River is a river in located in the Palghar district of Maharashtra. It is located 95.8 kilometres (59.5 mi) north of Mumbai the capital of the state.

Saphale (also spelled Safāle or Saphala) is a town in Palghar Taluka in Palghar District in Maharashtra, India, north of the mouth of the Vaitarna River. According to Census 2011 information, the location code or village code of Saphale village is 552293.
Bahadoli is a village in the Palghar taluka of Palghar district located in Maharashtra State, India.

Makunsar is a village in Maharashtra, India, located 6 kilometres (3.7 mi) away from Saphale's railway station (Western railway), on the Saphale-Palghar road. Gaon is well known for Temples, because more numbers of temples are seen in this gaon.
Agarwadi (Aagarwadi) is a small village in Maharashtra, India, having a population around 3600. The village is located at a distance of 6 km (3.7 mi) from Saphale Railway station, west side.

Kaldurg Fort is east of Palghar, Maharashtra, India, in the Sahyadri mountain range of northern Konkan. Its height is at least 475 meters above sea level, giving views of the Arabian Sea and the industrial town of Palghar to the west, as well as views of the Surya River, to the east.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Tandulwadi Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Tandulwadi Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Tandulwadi Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport, Mumbai (59 km) and the nearest railway station is Kalyan Junction (Mumbai) (52 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Tandulwadi Fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Tandulwadi Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Tandulwadi Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Tandulwadi Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Tandulwadi Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Surya River (India), Saphale, Bahadoli, Makunsar, Aagarwadi.
